ai_disclosure.banner: Musaium is an AI assistant. Replies are generated automatically and may contain errors.

metadata.title: Musaium — The Intelligent Museum Assistant
metadata.description: Photograph an artwork, ask a question, and let AI guide you. Musaium transforms every visit into an enriching experience.

hero.title: Your museum guide, powered by AI
hero.subtitle: Photograph an artwork, ask a question — Musaium responds with the historical, artistic, and cultural context of every piece.

features.title: How it works

items.title: Photograph
items.description: Take a photo of any artwork in a museum.

items.title: Ask your question
items.description: Ask whatever you want to know — technique, history, context.

items.title: Get an answer
items.description: AI analyzes the artwork and responds in real time with reliable sources.

features.gridSubtitle: Musaium combines visual recognition, artificial intelligence, and cultural data for an unprecedented museum experience.

grid.title: Visual recognition
grid.description: Take a photo of an artwork and AI identifies it instantly through computer vision.

grid.title: Contextual AI chat
grid.description: Ask your questions in natural language and receive detailed, sourced answers.

grid.title: Multilingual
grid.description: Interact in your language. Musaium understands and responds in French, English, and more.

grid.title: Visit history
grid.description: Find all your conversations and explored artworks, organized by visit.

grid.title: Offline mode
grid.description: Access your previous conversations even without an internet connection.

grid.title: Reliable sources
grid.description: Every answer is enriched by Wikidata and verified cultural databases.

showcase.title: An experience designed for the museum
showcase.description: Clean interface, instant answers, and intuitive navigation. Musaium adapts to your pace for a frictionless discovery.
showcase.caption: Available on iOS and Android

download.title: Ready to transform your visits?
download.subtitle: Download Musaium for free and start exploring museums differently.

chatShowcase.title: Point. Discover. Understand.
chatShowcase.subtitle: Aim your camera at any artwork. Within seconds, AI reveals its history, technique, and cultural significance.
bullets: Detailed answers backed by verified sources

messages.text: The Venus de Milo is a famous ancient Greek sculpture from the 2nd century BC. It represents Aphrodite, the goddess of love and beauty. Despite missing arms, it radiates remarkable elegance through the draping of its robes.

This is The Raft of the Medusa by Théodore Géricault, painted in 1818-1819. It depicts a group of shipwrecked sailors fighting for survival on a raft, showcasing dramatic realism and human desperation.

mapsShowcase.title: Every museum. Right around you.
mapsShowcase.subtitle: Wherever you are, Musaium locates nearby museums on an interactive map. From Paris to San Francisco, your guide travels with you.
bullets: List or map view — your choice

items.question: Is the app free?
items.answer: Yes, Musaium is completely free. Some advanced features may be offered as premium in the future.

items.question: Which museums are compatible?
items.answer: Musaium works in all museums. The AI recognizes artworks through computer vision and enriches responses via Wikidata.

items.question: Is my data protected?
items.answer: Absolutely. Your photos are never shared with third parties. See our privacy policy for full details.

items.question: Can the AI be wrong?
items.answer: Yes, that's why Musaium displays a transparency disclaimer before each session. Responses are AI-generated and may contain inaccuracies. We encourage you to verify important facts.

items.question: Do I need an internet connection?
items.answer: A connection is needed for new conversations. However, your previous conversations are accessible offline.

items.question: In which countries does Musaium work?
items.answer: Musaium works worldwide. The app uses geolocation to find nearby museums, and the AI can analyze artworks from any origin.

items.question: How do I contact support?
items.answer: Use the contact form on our support page or reach us on social media.

support.title: Help Center
support.subtitle: Find answers to your questions or contact us directly.

faq.question: Is the app free?
faq.answer: Yes, Musaium is free. Some advanced features may be offered as premium in the future.

faq.question: Which museums are compatible?
faq.answer: Musaium works in all museums. The AI recognizes artworks through computer vision and enriches its responses via Wikidata.

faq.question: Is my data protected?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Check our privacy policy for full details. Your photos are never shared.

faq.question: How do I contact support?
faq.answer: Use the form below or reach us on Telegram @musaium_support.

story.title: How Musaium turns a visit into a story
story.subtitle: Four steps from arrival to discovery.

steps.title: Visit a museum
steps.description: Walk into a partner museum and Musaium grounds in the venue.

steps.title: Snap or speak
steps.description: Take a photo of an artwork or ask a question out loud.

steps.title: AI answers in your tone
steps.description: Musaium adapts vocabulary, depth, and language to you.

steps.title: Follow the next chip
steps.description: Suggestions guide you to the next discovery, gallery after gallery.

metadata.title: Musaium for museums — conversational AI for cultural sites
metadata.description: The conversational AI companion for museums — multilingual, voice-first, multi-venue.

hero.title: Conversational AI built for museums
hero.subtitle: A multilingual, voice-first companion for your visitors — on-site and beyond.

problem.title: Audio guides are stuck in 2005
problem.body: Costly hardware, limited languages, no visitor insight, one fragmented app per venue. Today's visitors expect a conversation, not a pre-recorded commentary.

solution.title: A companion in every pocket
solution.body: Musaium speaks the visitor's language, listens to their questions, recognises artworks from a photo and adapts its tone to every moment of the visit — powered by your collection data.

differentiators.title: Multilingual conversational AI
differentiators.description: Eight languages on day one, including English, French, Spanish and Arabic.

differentiators.title: Visual similarity engine
differentiators.description: Visitors snap an artwork and explore comparable pieces across the collection.

differentiators.title: Multi-museum, single visitor
differentiators.description: One app, many partner museums — the visitor's story follows them venue to venue.

differentiators.title: Voice, hands-free
differentiators.description: Visitors speak; Musaium answers out loud — no need to keep eyes on the screen.

differentiators.title: Designed for before, during, and after the visit
differentiators.description: A future-ready out-of-museum companion to prepare the visit and extend the journey.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.tease: Custom pricing tailored to museum size

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your museum and we'll reply within two business days.
contact.fieldConsent: I agree to be contacted about Musaium.
contact.success: Thanks — we will reply within two business days.
contact.error: Unable to send right now. Please retry.

beta.heading: Join the pre-launch beta
beta.subheading: We're launching Musaium in June. The first 100 testers get on the waitlist.
beta.fieldConsent: I agree to receive Musaium product updates. One-click unsubscribe.
beta.success: Thanks! We've sent you a confirmation email — click the link to finalize your signup.
beta.error: Something went wrong. Please retry in a moment.

login.title: Musaium Administration
login.oauthError: Google sign-in failed. Try again or use your password.

userDetailPage.subtitle: Detailed user view.
userDetailPage.errorSelfAction: You cannot perform this action on your own account.
userDetailPage.confirmSuspendBody: The user will not be able to log in until you lift the suspension. Existing access tokens expire within 15 minutes.
userDetailPage.confirmUnsuspendBody: The user will be able to log in again on their next attempt.
userDetailPage.confirmDeleteBody: This soft-deletes the account: refresh tokens are revoked and the user can no longer log in. The row is kept for audit and GDPR forensics. Type the user's email to confirm.

tier.label: Tier
tier.confirmBody: This change is logged in the audit chain. The user is not notified automatically.

mfaPage.successBody: You will be asked for a code from your authenticator app on every future login.
mfaPage.setupIntro: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator, 1Password, or any TOTP app.
mfaPage.recoveryWarning: Save these now — each can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator. We cannot show them again.
mfaPage.copyAllAria: Copy all recovery codes to clipboard

reportsPage.subtitle: Review and moderate content reports.
reportsPage.reviewerNotesPlaceholder: Add notes about your review decision...

supportPage.subtitle: View and respond to support tickets.
supportPage.selectTicket: Select a ticket from the tickets page to view details.

analytics_consent.title: Analytics and cookies
analytics_consent.description: Musaium uses Plausible Analytics, a cookieless and privacy-friendly audience measurement tool. No personal data is collected and no advertising tracker is set on your device. You can decline this measurement if you prefer.
